economic_notes: First Nation received OPG settlement of $3,500,000 in 2016; per capita distribution ongoing with $495,000 remaining owing to members as at March 31, 2021. Greenstone Gold Mines impact agreement in place. OFNLP2008 investment fund maintained. Wawasum Group Limited (50% owned) and Wawasum Group LP accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) Ombabika Equipment Inc. subsidiary was not audited for 2021 or 2020 - inactive with no known assets but possible unrecorded liabilities; (2) First Nation did not prepare budgets as required by PSAS. Correction of error: ISC revenue of $164,002 was recorded in wrong period, reducing opening accumulated surplus. Four consolidated subsidiaries: Animbiigoosagagun Economic Development Trust, Bagwisendam Training and Wellness Centre, Maajiikan Inc., Ombabika Equipment Inc. Two GBEs on modified equity basis: Wawasum Group Limited and Wawasum Group LP. Prior year figures are restated due to error correction. No long-term debt. expenses_infrastructure mapped to Minor Capital program ($238,270). Economic/Employment expenses $397,449 mapped separately.
